en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. OF DAVID, FOR THE MEMORIAL OFFERING. Make haste, O God, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me!
zh: 神啊！求你搭救我； 耶和華啊！求你快來幫助我。

en: Let them be put to shame and confusion who seek my life! Let them be turned back and brought to dishonor who desire my hurt!
zh: 願那些尋索我性命的，抱愧蒙羞； 願那些喜悅我遭害的，退後受辱。

en: Let them turn back because of their shame who say, "Aha, Aha!"
zh: 願那些對我說：“啊哈！啊哈！”的， 都因羞愧退後。

en: May all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you! May those who love your salvation say evermore, "God is great!"
zh: 願所有尋求你的， 都因你歡喜快樂； 願那些喜愛你救恩的， 常說：“要尊 神為大。”

en: But I am poor and needy; hasten to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay!
zh: 至於我，我是困苦貧窮的； 神啊！求你快快到我這裡來； 你是我的幫助，我的拯救； 耶和華啊！求你不要耽延。
